<!-- Generated by StrongAIAutoDoc 20260314 -->

This directory contains Mocha integration tests that exercise natural language evaluation utilities and quick checks for requirements and user stories. The suites validate end to end behavior, including feasibility decisions, quality improvements, and splitting of compound requirements. Tests rely on a shared Evaluate module for rewriting and utilities, a QuickCheck module for classification, and a prompt repository plus chat driver for model backed flows. Assertions use the Expect library, while Sinon stubs chat model calls for deterministic edge cases. An ambient TypeScript declaration enables Markdown imports at compile time. Collectively, these tests safeguard correctness, error handling, and robustness under varied inputs and latency.

```mermaid
C4Component
title Test architecture for requirement and user story evaluation

%% Boundaries
Container_Boundary(tests, Test Modules, Mocha){
  Component(evalReq, evaluate-requirement.test.ts, Mocha, Integration tests for evaluateRequirement)
  Component(evalUser, evaluate-userstory.test.ts, Mocha, Integration tests for evaluateUserStory)
  Component(evalUtils, evaluate-utils.test.ts, Mocha, Tests for extractCodeFencedContent)
  Component(qcReq, quickcheck-requirement.eval.test.ts, Mocha, Classification tests for requirements)
  Component(qcUser, quickcheck-userstory.eval.test.ts, Mocha, Classification tests for user stories)
  Component(reqFeas, requirements-feasibility.eval.test.ts, Mocha, Feasibility yes or no for requirements)
  Component(reqSplit, requirements-splitter.eval.test.ts, Mocha, Splitting compound requirements)
  Component(reqEval, requirements.eval.test.ts, Mocha, Requirement improvement quality checks)
  Component(userEval, userstory-eval.test.ts, Mocha, User story evaluation quality checks)
  Component(userFeas, userstory-feasibility.eval.test.ts, Mocha, Feasibility yes or no for user stories)
  Component(globals, globals.d.ts, TypeScript, Ambient declaration for .md imports)
}

%% Internal system under test
Component_Ext(Evaluate, Evaluate module, src/Evaluate, evaluateRequirement, evaluateUserStory, extractCodeFencedContent, improveRequirementSplit)
Component_Ext(QuickCheck, QuickCheck module, src/QuickCheck, quickCheckLooksLikeRequirement, quickCheckLooksLikeUserStory)

%% Test infrastructure and externals
Component_Ext(Mocha, Mocha, Test Runner, Test runner and DSL)
Component_Ext(Expect, Expect, Assertions, Assertion library)
Component_Ext(Sinon, Sinon, Stubbing, Stub and spy utilities)
Component_Ext(PromptRepo, prompt-repository, Library, Prompts and chat driver abstractions)
ComponentDb(prompts, Prompts.json, JSON, Prompt definitions)
Component_Ext(ChatDriverFactory, ChatDriverFactory, Library, Builds chat drivers)
Component_Ext(LLM, LLM Provider, External, OpenAI like chat models)
Component_Ext(TS, TypeScript Compiler, Tooling, Type checking)

%% Relations from tests to frameworks
Rel(evalReq, Mocha, runs)
Rel(evalReq, Expect, asserts)
Rel(evalUser, Mocha, runs)
Rel(evalUser, Expect, asserts)
Rel(evalUtils, Mocha, runs)
Rel(evalUtils, Expect, asserts)
Rel(qcReq, Mocha, runs)
Rel(qcReq, Expect, asserts)
Rel(qcReq, Sinon, stubs)
Rel(qcUser, Mocha, runs)
Rel(qcUser, Expect, asserts)
Rel(qcUser, Sinon, stubs)
Rel(reqFeas, Mocha, runs)
Rel(reqFeas, Expect, asserts)
Rel(reqSplit, Mocha, runs)
Rel(reqSplit, Expect, asserts)
Rel(reqEval, Mocha, runs)
Rel(reqEval, Expect, asserts)
Rel(userEval, Mocha, runs)
Rel(userEval, Expect, asserts)
Rel(userFeas, Mocha, runs)
Rel(userFeas, Expect, asserts)

%% Relations from tests to system under test
Rel(evalReq, Evaluate, calls evaluateRequirement)
Rel(evalUser, Evaluate, calls evaluateUserStory)
Rel(evalUtils, Evaluate, calls extractCodeFencedContent)
Rel(reqSplit, Evaluate, calls improveRequirementSplit)
Rel(reqEval, Evaluate, calls evaluateRequirement)
Rel(userEval, Evaluate, calls evaluateUserStory)

Rel(qcReq, QuickCheck, calls quickCheckLooksLikeRequirement)
Rel(qcUser, QuickCheck, calls quickCheckLooksLikeUserStory)

%% Feasibility and model backed flows
Rel(reqFeas, PromptRepo, loads prompts and drivers)
Rel(reqFeas, prompts, reads)
Rel(reqFeas, ChatDriverFactory, creates driver)
Rel(userFeas, PromptRepo, loads prompts and drivers)
Rel(userFeas, prompts, reads)
Rel(userFeas, ChatDriverFactory, creates driver)

%% Under the hood model calls
Rel(Evaluate, ChatDriverFactory, creates driver for model calls)
Rel(QuickCheck, ChatDriverFactory, creates driver for model calls)
Rel(ChatDriverFactory, LLM, sends chat completion requests)

%% Tooling relation
Rel(globals, TS, augments module resolution)
```

Key components and interactions
- Evaluate module: Central API that rewrites or assesses requirements and user stories, exposes code fence extraction, and splits compound specs. Multiple test suites validate outputs, formatting, and error handling.
- QuickCheck module: Lightweight classifiers that decide if text looks like a requirement or user story. Tests verify strict and friendly thresholds and use Sinon to stub model responses.
- prompt-repository and ChatDriverFactory: Provide prompt storage and model client construction. Feasibility tests and some classifiers load prompts from Prompts.json, build a chat driver, and call an external LLM provider.
- Test harness: Mocha orchestrates execution and timeouts; Expect performs assertions; Sinon ensures determinism for adversarial cases.
- globals.d.ts: A compile time aid that enables Markdown imports, ensuring TypeScript compatibility during test builds.
